tickets.context: Co-develop a PM‑focused series or toolkit integrating SDT and practical AI workflows.

evidence.title: Engagement scope with Shujaat: involvement tiers, follow‑ups, next call

ask_first_to_shujaat.subject: Quick check — would a short PM‑focused pilot be valuable?
ask_first_to_shujaat.body:
Hi Shujaat,

Quick check before an intro proposal: would a 3–4 week PM‑focused pilot be useful?
Option A: weekly “AI & Careers” myth‑busting (real PM cases).
Option B: “Base Athleticism” micro‑series (communication, feedback loops, relationship leverage).

If yes, I’ll draft a one‑pager and share involvement options so we can pick scope and metrics.

— Logan

double_opt_in_to_shujaat.subject: Intro to Careerspan (Vrijen & Logan) — PM‑first pilot ideas
double_opt_in_to_shujaat.body:
Hi Shujaat,

Following up to introduce Careerspan (Vrijen & Logan). We’re focused on PMs and practical AI workflows.
Two quick pilot paths: a short myth‑busting weekly or a “base athleticism” toolkit. If you’re open, we’d love to pick one and define success criteria together.

Would you be open to a 30‑min call next week to select a pilot and first deliverable?

double_opt_in_to_team.subject: Intro request: Shujaat — PM‑first pilot collaboration
double_opt_in_to_team.body:
Team,

Requesting double‑opt‑in to connect with Shujaat around two pilot paths — short myth‑busting weekly, or “base athleticism” toolkit.
Why now: strong alignment on human judgment with AI; Shujaat’s cadence matches our PM focus.

If green‑lit, we’ll send a 1‑pager and propose success criteria + timeline.
